stemHtml: An aircraft equipped with an ADF is flying over land during sunset. The pilot tunes the frequency of an NDB station located 50 NM from the aircraft. About 1 minute later, they notice the ADF needle swinging erratically. What is the most probable cause?

options.a: Changes in the signal polarisation due to sky waves.
options.b: Flying close to the station, into the cone of confusion.
options.d: Coastal refraction as the waves transit from land to sea.
